candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Exact short-term/current portion of debt definition and explicitly excludes leases.
Represents current financing debt and can capture years where current debt is labeled this way.

Lease-related maturity line and should be excluded from baseline STD.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Used two non-lease current debt labels to accommodate label changes across years. Excluded lease-related rows.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

Component of PPE, not total PPE.
Component of PPE, not total PPE.
